data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. EARLY BIRD form hasn't been great but has the inside draw. Last time finished last on April 10 over 380m at this track behind Nikki's Regret beaten 15 lengths (23.05) in a Maiden. Looks the one to beat on her best form. 6. BARNSLEY returned a better run last time, finishing in the money (28.87) at this track behind Takeover Target in a Restricted WIN. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last start. Must be included in calculations. 7. PIERRE D'ARCY turned in a better effort at this track last start, finishing third behind Takeover Target (29.65) in a Restricted WIN. Didn't win last time but still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Winning chance. 8. RUI'S ROCKET cannot be ruled out.","runners":[1,6,7,8],"exclusive":false}
